hero.eyebrow: On the path to success, Al-Biruni is with you
hero.title: Al-Biruni Study Point
hero.subtitle: Physics, Chemistry, Math, Higher Math & ICT for SSC and HSC. Offline and online batches, recorded classes, MCQ and CQ assessments.

about.title: About ABSP
about.body: Al-Biruni Study Point (ABSP) is a science-focused coaching center. We help SSC and HSC students prepare for exams through clear concepts, regular practice, and structured assessment. Small batches, experienced teachers, and our digital platform work together for your progress.

courses.title: Our courses
courses.subtitle: SSC and HSC science — separate tracks with video classes and exams

tutor.bio: 5+ years of teaching experience. Brings an engineering mindset to —clear concepts, plenty of practice, and regular MCQ and CQ assessment.
